_meta.keyKnowledge: We reflect on, analyse, evaluate and document how we and others respond to artworks and influences to inform and refine our own practice.

_source.w: We reflect on, analyse, evaluate and document how we and others respond to artworks and influences to inform and refine our own practice.
y: Rigorous critical engagement with art — our own and others' — is fundamental to mature artistic practice.
Understanding how we are influenced by other artists helps us develop our practice with greater self-awareness.
Documentation of our analytical thinking demonstrates the intellectual depth of our artistic engagement.
eg: We write substantial critical analyses of artworks using appropriate art historical and theoretical frameworks.
We document our artistic influences and analyse how they shape our own practice.
We evaluate our artworks against our artistic intentions and identify areas for development.
We engage in peer critique that is both rigorous and supportive.
We maintain comprehensive visual diaries that record our research, experiments and reflections.
We articulate our artistic position and how it has developed over time.
